title: Comfort Switch
description:
Following a trigger, provides adjustable pulse at the output, includes permanent on and warning-function.
Before the output is deactivated again, a short switch off prewarning (on / off) takes place

inputs.description: Pulse at input switches output (O) on for the duration set in parameter (Don). Another pulse switches output (O) off again. Long-click = Switches output (O) permanently on.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Disables all inputs when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Remanence input: If active, the function block retains its previous state after a Miniserver reboot. The state of the function block is saved: – When saving to the Miniserver – At a planned reboot – Before a backup – Once per hour The data is saved on the SD card.
Defines the duration of a long click to permanently switch on the output (O) via the input (Tr).
Time of the switch-off warning before output (O) switches off.
